commands.command: vp create vite:application --no-interactive -- --template vue-ts # create Vue+TS app

commands: cat vite-plus-application/src/env.d.ts # check Vue shim was added

commands.command: cd vite-plus-application && vp install # install dependencies
cd vite-plus-application && sed -i.bak -e '/jsPlugins/d' -e '/rules:/d' -e '/options:/d' vite.config.ts && vp check --fix # fix generated formatting and ensure no errors
